evaluators.name: Store Setup Shipping Policy Template Share URL Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks if the user copied the share URL of the most popular 'shipping policy template' article in the Store setup category.

evaluators.name: Fastest US Carrier Under $10 for ≤2 kg Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks if the user used the carrier comparison with correct filters, selected the fastest qualifying US option under $10 for up to 2 kg, and viewed its setup instructions.

evaluators.name: Shopify Integration Video Start Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks if the user started a video under 10 minutes from a Shopify integration article in the Store Integrations category.

evaluators.name: Billing Downgrade Request Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks if the user submitted a billing support request to downgrade from Pro to Basic with a $30/month maximum budget, using the Manage Subscriptions and Plan Changes article.

evaluators.name: Auto-Cancel Unfulfilled Orders After 7 Days Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks if order automation settings were updated so that auto-cancellation of unfulfilled orders is enabled after 7 days, with changes applied after the baseline date.

evaluators.name: Defective Item Return Canned Response Creation Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks if the user created a canned response 'Defective item return - template A' in the 'Returns & refunds' folder from the defective-item template and replaced the discount placeholder with '10% discount'.

evaluators.name: SYNC_409 Product Feed Incident Report Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks if the user submitted an incident report for a Product Sync incident describing SYNC_409 product feed update issues with medium severity.

evaluators.name: Weekly Payouts with $100 USD Threshold Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks if payout settings were updated to weekly frequency with a $100 minimum payout amount in USD, after the baseline date.
